These Warnings help a lot because if we

normal type annotations do nothing in

favorite analogy for using type
annotations is the traffic light if you
think about it when you're driving a
traffic light doesn't really do anything
it just has three callers that tell you
when it's safe to drive through an
intersection it doesn't do anything at
all you can still drive through that
intersection even if the lights are red
sometimes that might go well and other
times you might end up in an accident so
type annotations are kind of like the

making terrible mistakes but they warn
